one thing I would love to do is to be able to hold all ground truths, meaning, everything the user has ever said about the project, or agreed about the project and load it all in the context window of a large model that has a big context window and ask it questions, or refine it, or have it recompile the entire wiki or whatever -- how can we approach that? Proposed five approaches for loading all ground truths into a large context window: `pc oracle` for full-wiki Q&A, `--recompile` for wiki regeneration with global consistency, user-claim export from citation logs, `--interactive` REPL mode, and `--gaps` for gap detection — recommending the basic oracle command as highest-value/lowest-complexity to build first.
